$description: Component manifest for the IDOMAIN 壹東實業 design system. All components consume CSS custom properties from /tokens/colors_and_type.css.

components.name: Website UI Kit
components.description: Full bilingual corporate marketing site (React 18): nav, hero, stats, product cards, process timeline, project grid, contact, footer. The reference implementation of the brand on the web.

components.name: Stationery Kit
components.description: Business card + letterhead layouts using the standard logo lockups.

components.name: Buttons
components.description: Primary (brand blue), secondary (outline), ghost, copper accent, and text-link buttons in two sizes.

components.name: Badges
components.description: Status and category badges — flat fills, square-leaning radii.

components.name: Card
components.description: White card, 1px #e3e4e6 border, 4–8px radius, optional eyebrow topline. No gradient fills, no colored left-border cards.

components.name: Form inputs
components.description: Text inputs and selects with brand-blue focus ring (2px, 2px offset).

components.name: Elevation
components.description: Shadow scale specimen — soft, low, cool-tinted.

components.name: Color specimens
components.description: Primary blues, copper accent, neutral grays, and the restricted 50th-anniversary palette.

components.name: Type specimens
components.description: Serif display over sans body — the brand's typographic signature.

components.name: Logo specimens
components.description: Brush-stroke mark, horizontal/lockup variants, and 50th-anniversary marks (anniversary use only).
